# Vike documentation index for AI

> @AI (CRITICAL FOR AI AGENTS) — use Vike's docs proficiently:
> - READ THIS ENTIRE FILE - don't stop at the top
> - These are connection points, NOT actual documentation
> - SERIOUSLY CONSIDER fetching URLs below when matched with your task
> - SERIOUSLY CONSIDER fetching URLs below based on user prompts
> - Vike's docs lives at https://github.com/vikejs/vike/tree/main/docs — CONSIDER searching inside the entire docs

All paths below are relative to https://vike.dev (e.g. `/data-fetching` → https://vike.dev/data-fetching).

## Data & rendering
- /data-fetching — `+data` hook + `useData()`; server-side loading, route params, serialization, `passToClient`; data mutation & subsequent data via Telefunc/tRPC/TanStack Query; SSG data; state management
- /pre-rendering — SSG build-time HTML; static hosting; opt-in/opt-out per page; partial pre-rendering; `onBeforePrerenderStart()`; SSG-vs-SSR trade-offs; "should I pre-render?"
- /SSR-vs-SPA — SSR vs SPA trade-offs; SEO/crawlers; hydration; per-page `+ssr`; SPA = empty HTML shell; when to use each
- /ssr — `+ssr` (default true); enable/disable SSR per-page or globally; `false` ⇒ SPA/client-only; alternative to `<ClientOnly>`
- /stream — `+stream` HTML streaming (`boolean|'web'|'node'`, default false); requires `ssr:true`; `+data` awaited before streaming
- /prerender — `+prerender` SSG; per-page bool or global object; options: `partial`, `noExtraDir`, `parallel`, `disableAutoRun`, `keepDistServer`, `redirects`
- /redirects — `+redirects` 301 permanent redirect map; parameterized routes & globs; external/non-http schemes; server-side only

## Core API — context, components, config
- /pageContext — per-request/render context; built-ins (`urlPathname`, `urlParsed`, `routeParams`, `data`, `user`…); custom props; server vs client availability; `passToClient`; TS typing
- /globalContext — app-wide context; built-ins (`pages`, `config`, `isClientSide`); `onCreateGlobalContext`; custom props; TS typing
- /Page — `+Page` root component; JSX/Vue/Solid; SSR + hydration; reads `pageContext`
- /Head — `+Head`; inject raw HTML into `<head>`; server-side first-render only; cumulative; SEO/social/favicon; not updated on client nav
- /Layout — `+Layout` shared wrapper around `+Page`; cumulative, nestable; group/global/scoped layouts
- /Wrapper — `+Wrapper` wraps `+Page` and `+Layout`; tool/provider integration (state, data); nestable; vs `+Layout`
- /config — `+config.js`; config inheritance, cumulative vs override; `.clear.js`/`.default.js` suffixes; pointer imports; global vs per-page
- /client — `+client.js` client-only entry; first JS on client; non-cumulative; init analytics/error-tracking/cookie-consent
- /error-page — `_error` page; 404 & generic errors; `throw render()`; `pageContext.abortReason`/`abortStatusCode`; prerender `404.html`

## Routing
- /routing — overview; filesystem routing, `@param`, route groups; Route String vs Route Function; `+guard`; `src/` support
- /filesystem-routing — URL↔file mapping; ignored dirs (`src`/`index`/`pages`/`renderer`); inheritance via directory hierarchy
- /route — `+route`; Route String params vs Route Function; `routeParams`; precedence
- /route-string — `@param` syntax; glob/catch-all; `pageContext.routeParams`; precedence over filesystem routing
- /route-function — programmatic `+route.js`; `resolveRoute()`; sync-only; precedence value; can't inject pageContext (use guard/data/onBeforeRender)
- /routing-precedence — conflict resolution; static beats parameterized; Route String specificity; Route Function numeric precedence (incl. negative)
- /clientRouting — `+clientRouting` (default false; true with vike-{react,vue,solid}); SPA client-side routing; intercepts `<a>`; opt-out via `data-vike="false"`/`rel="external"`; unlocks `onHydrationEnd`/`onPageTransitionStart`
- /base-url — `baseAssets`/`baseServer`; CDN; `import.meta.env.BASE_URL`; `renderPage` `isBaseMissing`
- /active-links — highlight current nav link; `pageContext.urlPathname`; `usePageContext()`; custom Link

## Hooks (lifecycle)
- /hooks — full hooks overview; execution order (server vs client); first-render vs client-nav sequences; hook env options
- /data — `+data()`; server-side data; `.server`/`.client`/`.shared` variants; `pageContext.data`; `useData()`; `throw render()`/`redirect()`; ORM/SQL; without vike-{react,vue,solid}
- /guard — `+guard()` auth/access control; runs before `data()`; `throw render()`/`redirect()`; server-side default; role-based
- /onBeforeRender — `+onBeforeRender()`; advanced data fetch + `pageContext` manipulation; `meta` env override; `.server`/`.shared`/`.client`; supersedes `data()` for complex cases
- /onCreatePageContext — runs right after routing (server & client); init/extend `pageContext`; derived props; store setup; `.ssr`/`.server`/`.client` targeting; cumulative
- /onCreateGlobalContext — init `globalContext` (not per-page); server & client; global store; server global data; client auth state
- /onError — `+onError()` server-side error hook; logging/monitoring (Sentry); cumulative/global
- /onHookCall — intercept hook execution; instrumentation/tracing (Sentry/OpenTelemetry); call `hook.call()` before `await`; beta
- /onHydrationEnd — client-only; fires once after initial hydration; requires Client Routing; non-cumulative
- /onPageTransitionStart — client nav hook; `isBackwardNavigation`; CSS classes for animations/loading; pairs with `onPageTransitionEnd()`; Client Routing
- /onBeforePrerenderStart — build-time only; supply URLs for parameterized routes; returns `string[]` or `{url,pageContext}[]`; bulk prefetch skipping `data()`/`onBeforeRender()`
- /onPrerenderStart — build-time; after `onBeforePrerenderStart`; manipulate full pageContext list; i18n URL generation

## Utils — functions & components
- /useData — `useData()`; access `pageContext.data` in components; needs vike-{react,vue,solid} or custom renderer; avoids prop drilling
- /usePageContext — `usePageContext()`; access `pageContext` anywhere (client+server); manual impl via React Context / Vue provide-inject
- /useConfig — `useConfig()`; set page config (title/meta/head) from hooks & components; call before `await`; `<Config>`/`<Head>` alternatives; streaming gotcha; dynamic SEO/OG
- /useHydrated — `useHydrated()`; false on server/pre-hydration then true; re-renders on hydration; disable buttons/forms until ready
- /getGlobalContext — `getGlobalContextAsync(isProduction)`/`getGlobalContextSync()`; `assetsManifest`, `viteRuntimeInfo`, `isClientSide`; server init before requests
- /redirect — `throw redirect(url, statusCode?)` from `vike/abort`; HTTP redirect (302 default/301); use in `guard()`/`data()`; vs `navigate()` for post-render
- /render — `throw render(statusCode|url, reason?)` from `vike/abort`; render error page or rewrite URL; `pageContext.abortReason`/`abortStatusCode`
- /navigate — `navigate(url, options?)` client-side; `keepScrollPosition`, `overwriteLastHistoryEntry`; awaits render; for post-render redirects
- /reload — `reload()` client-side; reload via Client Router (faster than `location.reload()`); requires Client Routing
- /prefetch — `prefetch(url)` from `vike/client/router`; predictive prefetch on hover/submit; requires Client Routing (not Server Routing)
- /ClientOnly — `<ClientOnly fallback>` / `clientOnly()`; render children only on client post-hydration; removes code from server bundle; browser-only APIs
- /modifyUrl — `modifyUrl(url, options)` from `vike/modifyUrl`; change pathname/protocol/host/port keep query; i18n locale extraction
- /renderPage — `renderPage(pageContextInit)` server SSR middleware entry; `urlOriginal` required, `headersOriginal`; returns `httpResponse{statusCode,headers,body}`; manual integration (Express/Cloudflare/Vercel/Deno/Bun)
- /escapeInject — `escapeInject` template tag (server-side); XSS-safe HTML in `onRenderHtml()`; `dangerouslySkipEscape()`; not needed with vike-{react,vue,solid}
- /injectFilter — `injectFilter(assets)`; control which preload/script tags inject & where (`HTML_BEGIN`/`HTML_END`/`false`); filter by `assetType`/`mediaType`/`isEntry`/`src`; production-only, beta

## Settings & config control
- /passToClient — which `pageContext`/`globalContext` props are serialized to client; dot-notation nested paths; `@brillout/json-serializer`; cumulative
- /meta — define custom settings/hooks; `env` (server/client/config/production); change existing hook env (e.g. run `+data` on client); `effect()` validation; `vite` HMR; examples `+sql`/`+dataEndpointUrl`
- /csp — `+csp` Content Security Policy nonce; per-request crypto nonce injected into scripts; `pageContext.cspNonce`; no `unsafe-inline`; customize via `+headersResponse`
- /headersResponse — `+headersResponse` set HTTP response headers (static or async fn); read/modify via `pageContext.headersResponse`; beta
- /prefetchStaticAssets — `false|'hover'|'viewport'` (default 'hover'); prefetch static assets (not pageContext data); requires Client Routing; per-link override
- /keepScrollPosition — preserve scroll across navigation; scroll groups via route params/config; string/function grouping
- /hooksTimeout — per-hook promise timeouts (default warning@4s/error@30s); error renders error-page; debug slow hooks
- /settings — overview/index of remaining settings; HTML shell (`lang`/favicon/`htmlAttributes`/`bodyAttributes`), head, SSR/streaming, prerender, routing, security, performance

## Build & CLI
- /cli — `vike dev`/`build`/`preview`/`prerender`; flags; `VIKE_CONFIG`/`VITE_CONFIG` env; JSON5 values
- /api — programmatic JS API: `prerender()`/`build`/`dev`/`preview`; signatures; `globalContext`; SSG trigger

## Head & SEO
- /head-tags — `<title>`/`<meta>`/og:image/favicon/viewport in `<head>`; per-page vs global; `useConfig()`; dynamic from data/pageContext; cumulative; SPA handling
- /title — `+title`; sets `<title>` + og:title; string or `fn(pageContext)`; dynamic `document.title` on nav
- /description — `+description`; meta description + og:description; string or `fn(pageContext)`
- /image — `+image`; og:image / Twitter card preview; string or `fn(pageContext)`
- /viewport — `+viewport` (`'responsive'|number|null`, default 'responsive'); numeric = virtual width for non-responsive layouts; null disables
- /htmlAttributes — `+htmlAttributes` on `<html>` (e.g. `lang`); cumulative; object or `fn(pageContext)`
- /bodyAttributes — `+bodyAttributes` on `<body>` (e.g. theme class); cumulative; object or `fn(pageContext)`

## Guides — app concerns
- /auth — authentication; `pageContext.user`; `onCreatePageContext`/`onCreateGlobalContext`; `guard()` + `throw render()`/`redirect()`; SSG client-side user fetch; any auth lib (Better Auth, Auth.js, Passport, Auth0)
- /env — environment variables; `PUBLIC_ENV__` prefix for client; `import.meta.env` static replacement; `.env` files; secrets in `.env.local`; vite.config must use `process.env`
- /headers — HTTP request/response headers; `pageContext` access; normalization; cookies; `renderPage` integration
- /i18n — internationalization; `onBeforeRoute` locale extraction; `pageContext.locale`; URL-based routing; `modifyUrl()`; `onBeforePrerenderStart` locale prerender; `lang`
- /preloading — asset preload injection; Early Hints (HTTP 103); `injectFilter()`; `+prefetchStaticAssets`; assets manifest
- /static-directory — `public/` dir; static file serving; no content-hashing caveat; `express.static()` alternative
- /file-env — `.server.js`/`.client.js`/`.shared.js`/`.ssr.js` suffixes; env-scoped modules; secret isolation; build errors on wrong-env import
- /path-aliases — `#`-prefixed import aliases; vite `resolve.alias`; tsconfig `paths`; `package.json#imports`; dual-config requirement
- /api-routes — server-side HTTP endpoints; Express/Hono middleware; RPC alternative (Telefunc/tRPC); file uploads; cache headers; middleware order
- /common-issues — broken npm packages in SSR; `ssr.noExternal`; hydration mismatches; server vs browser render differences

## Integration
- /server — `+server.js` universal server; Hono/Express/Fastify/H3/Elysia; `pageContext.runtime`; standalone build; server HMR; compression; Express/Fastify incompatible with Bun/Deno/Cloudflare
- /store — state management + SSR hydration; `storeInitialState`; `passToClient`; `onCreatePageContext`/`onAfterRenderHtml`/`onBeforeRenderClient`; Redux/Pinia; mismatch prevention
- /css-in-js — SSR style collection; FOUC prevention; `onBeforeRenderHtml`/`onAfterRenderHtml`; `useConfig()`/`+Head`; styled-components/styled-jsx/Grommet
- /markdown — MDX (`@mdx-js/rollup`), `unplugin-vue-markdown`, `vite-plugin-md`; frontmatter via `pageContext.config`; global metadata via `onCreateGlobalContext`
- /graphql — Apollo/Relay/urql; server + client fetching; SSR; `vike-react-apollo`; manual integration
- /error-tracking — `+onError()` + `+client.js` init; Sentry/Bugsnag/Rollbar; client + server capture
- /integration — manual/advanced integration; `onHydrationEnd` vanilla JS init; analytics; `renderPage()` middleware; non-JS backends (REST/GraphQL); service workers; view transitions

## Deploy
- /deploy — deployment overview; static hosts vs serverless full-stack vs self-hosted; Vike-as-middleware
- /cloudflare — Cloudflare Workers; `@cloudflare/vite-plugin`; Wrangler; SSR; bindings (D1/KV/Durable Objects); bundle-size limits
- /vercel — `vite-plugin-vercel`; SSR + static; ISR; Edge Functions; `+server.js`; API routes need Express in dev
- /aws — AWS Lambda + full-stack; Flightcontrol/SST/Serverless Framework/SAM; Vike-as-middleware; SST+Hono example
- /docker — Node.js container; no special adapter; `server.host` auto-true; HMR config; build OOM (`NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size`)
- /github-pages — static-only; pre-render all; upload `dist/client/`; `.nojekyll`; base URL; GitHub Actions
- /netlify — static/pre-rendered only; `dist/client/`; base URL; see /netlify-functions for SSR
- /cloudflare-pages — static + Pages Functions for SSR; deprecated in favor of Workers; manual integration
- /static-hosts — generic static hosting; pre-render all; `vike preview`; base URL; GitHub Actions
- /edgeone-pages — Tencent EdgeOne; `@edgeone/vite`; `serverWrapper`; SSR + streaming; Git/CLI deploy
- /aws-lambda — AWS Lambda serverless; stub → see /aws
- /netlify-functions — SSR via Netlify serverless functions (vs static); community examples

## Project & getting started
- /new — scaffold new app (Bati scaffolder); Node/Deno/Bun; vike-{react,vue,solid} templates; core-only option
- /add — add SSR/SSG to existing Vite app; vite.config setup; `+onRenderClient`/`+onRenderHtml`/`+Page`; Express/Hono/Fastify wiring
- /extensions — extension system (vike-{react,vue,solid,svelte,angular}); React Query/Apollo/Redux/Pinia integrations; server adapters; optional vs manual
- /faq — community channels; CSS leakage; CJS/ESM errors; lazy-transpiling requests; contributing
